headline.es: Patch 7.1f: Taliyah y Viego nerfed salen de SS en jungla. K'Sante baja de SS. Shen y Kayle buffed suben. Meta de dive sigue fuerte con Wukong y Hecarim como mejores junglas. Xayah, Jhin y Ezreal dominan Dragon Lane.
headline.en: Patch 7.1f: Taliyah and Viego nerfed out of SS jungle. K'Sante drops from SS. Shen and Kayle buffed up. Dive meta remains strong with Wukong and Hecarim as best junglers. Xayah, Jhin and Ezreal dominate Dragon Lane.

note.es: Taliyah, K'Sante, Viego, Kog'Maw nerfed. Shen, Kayle, Akshan buffed. Ambessa y Gragas ajustados.
note.en: Taliyah, K'Sante, Viego, Kog'Maw nerfed. Shen, Kayle, Akshan buffed. Ambessa and Gragas adjusted.

note.es: Taliyah añadida. Garen, Ryze, Twisted Fate nerfed. Kayn, Graves, Bard buffed. Kraken Slayer y Randuin's Omen ajustados.
note.en: Taliyah added. Garen, Ryze, Twisted Fate nerfed. Kayn, Graves, Bard buffed. Kraken Slayer and Randuin's Omen adjusted.

note.es: Zeri, Sivir, Tristana buffed. Vayne, Mel, Riven nerfed. Vladimir +Armor.
note.en: Zeri, Sivir, Tristana buffed. Vayne, Mel, Riven nerfed. Vladimir +Armor.

note.es: Talon, Fizz, Varus, Twitch, Yone buffed. Rammus, Renekton, Swain, Teemo, Amumu nerfed.
note.en: Talon, Fizz, Varus, Twitch, Yone buffed. Rammus, Renekton, Swain, Teemo, Amumu nerfed.
